chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 833 of 2025 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 834 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 15.10.2025 Mr. Sajid Ali Kalhoro, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicants has today filed statement along with certified copy of the bail application acquired in the main case, wherein the applicants have been granted bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each. Learned DPG, however, contends that the present recovery was made on its own, and the main case, as alleged, is not to be treated as such. Irrespective to the said statement of learned DPG, the arrest of the applicants having made in the Crime No.219/2025 of Police Station Moro, wherein, during investigation, the present cases have come up along with the CRO reports acquired, wherein no other case is found present, the present applicants are found to have made sufficient ground for further enquiry. Accordingly, both the bail applications are allowed, and the applicants Muhammad Raheem S/o Ghulam Hussain Dahri and Majid S/o Muhammad Raheem Dahri are admitted to post-arrest bail in Crime Nos.224/2025 and 225/2025, respectively, registered at Police Station Moro, District Naushahro Feroze, under Section 24 of Sindh Arms Act, 2013, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court.

Irrespective to the said statement of learned DPG, the arrest of the applicants having made in the Crime No.219/2025 of Police Station Moro, wherein, during investigation, the present cases have come up along with the CRO reports acquired, wherein no other case is found present, the present applicants are found to have made sufficient ground for further enquiry. Accordingly, both the bail applications are allowed, and the applicants Muhammad Raheem S/o Ghulam Hussain Dahri and Majid S/o Muhammad Raheem Dahri are admitted to post-arrest bail in Crime Nos.224/2025 and 225/2025, respectively, registered at Police Station Moro, District Naushahro Feroze, under Section 24 of Sindh Arms Act, 2013, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. Both the bail applications stand disposed of in the above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E Abdul Basit
